recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.

recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.

recommendations.title: Barney's Version
recommendations.overview: The picaresque and touching story of the politically incorrect, fully lived life of the impulsive, irascible and fearlessly blunt Barney Panofsky.
